title: Texas to Bataan
actors: John 'Dusty' King, David Sharpe, Max Terhune
plot: In the 17th of the 24 films in Monogram's "Range Buster" series, Texas ranch owner Conroy returns from Washington with an order for horses to be shipped to the Philippines. The Range Busters, Dusty, Davy and Alibi, are selected to...
